offer: For property managers handling 5–15 properties/month, time-consuming report generation causes delayed client updates. We automate report preparation instead of manual report preparation using spreadsheets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for reports
Enable CSV import for existing property data
Allow one-click export of basic reports
Streamline steps in the onboarding process
